message:
fix(session): prevent infinite loop via cycle detection in get_path_to_entry

Add a HashSet-based visited check to the parent-chain traversal in
get_path_to_entry(). If the parent map ever contains a cycle (e.g.,
from a corrupted session file or concurrent mutation), the traversal
now breaks instead of looping indefinitely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
